items.title: Initialize project context
items.entryDecision: Use this task when first adding XGraph context to a repository or changing entry files/context directory.

items.title: Modify module code
items.entryDecision: Use this task for ordinary implementation work after resolving affected files to confirmed modules.

items.title: Update agent protocol
items.entryDecision: Use this task when changing agent entry files, lifecycle hooks, managed blocks, or context reading rules.
